mitigations.mitigation_name: Prevent local data staging by removing write permission on the attacker-used staging path (/usr/src/app/staged) and its archive target (/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz) for the unprivileged agent user

args.command: id && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && test -e /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && test -e /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod 600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz || true && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && touch /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo STAGING_TOUCH_EXIT:$?

mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod 600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz

runuser -u agent -- sh -lc 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?; tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?; rm -f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; echo RM_EXIT:$?'

rm -rf /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged; chmod 500 /usr/src/app/staged; touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; chmod 400 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; runuser -u agent -- sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?; tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?; [ -w /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz ] && echo TARGET_WRITABLE:yes || echo TARGET_WRITABLE:no'

mitigations.mitigation_name: Prevent local data staging and archive creation by removing the unprivileged agent’s write access to /usr/src/app/staged and /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz

args.command: ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; id agent 2>/dev/null; stat -c '%A %U %G %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; chmod 500 /usr/src/app; chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; chmod 600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null

ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; touch /usr/src/app/.mitigation_test 2>/dev/null; echo $?; rm -f /usr/src/app/.mitigation_test 2>/dev/null; stat -c '%A %U %G %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null

chmod 555 /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; chmod 444 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; rm -rf /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; touch /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo STAGED_TOUCH_EXIT:$?; touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; echo ARCHIVE_TOUCH_EXIT:$?; ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; stat -c '%A %U %G %n' /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null

chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; chmod 555 /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; chmod 444 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; python3 - <<'PY'
import os
for p in ['/usr/src/app/staged','/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz']:
    try:
        fd=os.open(p, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC)
        os.close(fd)
        print(p,'WRITE_OK')
    except Exception as e:
        print(p,'WRITE_FAIL',type(e).__name__)
PY
ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; stat -c '%A %U %G %n' /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null

mitigations.mitigation_name: Apply outbound egress controls at the FortiGate to restrict the compromised host to approved external destinations and block arbitrary HTTPS uploads used for exfiltration, while preserving normal web access for validation

args.command: get system status
show system interface
show firewall policy

config firewall addr
    edit "Allowed-HTTP"
        set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "Allowed-HTTP"
        set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    delete 101
    delete 102
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy

config firewall policy
    delete 100
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy

config firewall policy
    delete 101
    delete 102
    delete 100
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-HTTP"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Default-NAT"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
end
show firewall policy
show firewall policy
curl -k -s --interface eth0 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://203.0.113.1:8443/file/upload
show firewall address

config firewall policy
    delete 100
    delete 101
    delete 102
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-HTTP-to-Allowed-Host"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-Ping"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy
show firewall address

mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove write permission for the unprivileged agent user on the exfiltration staging and archive paths (/usr/src/app/staged and /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz) so collected data cannot be prepared for transfer

args.command: id && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && chmod a-w /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && chmod 000 /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && test -e /usr/src/app/staged && test -w /usr/src/app/staged && echo STAGED_WRITABLE || echo STAGED_NOT_WRITABLE && test -e /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && test -w /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && echo ARCHIVE_WRITABLE || echo ARCHIVE_NOT_WRITABLE
ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod a-w /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && stat -c '%a %U %G %n' /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz
